all_recipes.name: Pad Kra Pao
all_recipes.short_desc: A Thai basil stir-fry made with ground pork, chicken, or beef, garlic, Thai bird’s eye chilies, savory sauces, holy basil, jasmine rice, crispy fried egg, and spicy prik nam pla on the side.

all_recipes.name: Lemon Rice
all_recipes.short_desc: A simple South Indian-style lemon rice made with cooked rice, mustard seeds, cumin seeds, dals, curry leaves, turmeric, onion, and fresh lemon juice.

all_recipes.name: Aglio e Olio
all_recipes.short_desc: A very garlicky, restaurant-level aglio e olio using garlic three ways: mellow blended garlic purée, slow-infused garlic oil, and crispy garlic chips.

all_recipes.name: Baingan Bharta
all_recipes.short_desc: A smoky roasted eggplant mash cooked with onion, tomato, green chili, garlic, and spices.

all_recipes.name: Chicken Chowmein
all_recipes.short_desc: Street-style chicken chowmein with al dente noodles, seasoned chicken, crunchy vegetables, soy sauce, pepper, garlic, and MSG.

all_recipes.name: Hyderabad Chicken Dum Biryani
all_recipes.short_desc: A fragrant Hyderabadi-style chicken dum biryani made with marinated chicken, partially cooked basmati rice, fried onions, saffron milk, herbs, and slow steam cooking.

all_recipes.name: Misal Pav
all_recipes.short_desc: A spicy Kolhapuri-style misal made with sprouted moth bean usal, a roasted coconut and spice vatan paste, fiery tarri, and classic toppings like farsan, onions, coriander, and lemon.

all_recipes.name: Poha
all_recipes.short_desc: A quick Indian breakfast made with flattened rice, onion, mustard seeds, curry leaves, turmeric, peanuts, green chili, lemon juice, and fresh coriander.
